prompt:
Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: character-free 16:9 background plate for scene 5
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style reference only
Primary request: moonlit mountain-temple courtyard and descending path arranged as a clear relay route from a spring at one side toward the open temple doorway; several empty bucket landing spots imply teamwork
Style/medium: handcrafted layered rice-paper collage, torn edges, visible fibers, soft ink accents, approved palette shifted to moonlit blue and warm amber
Composition/framing: wide diagonal action path with open positions for three monk cutouts and water-splash overlays; lower subtitle area readable
Lighting/mood: energetic cooperation, gentle nighttime urgency
Constraints: no people, no animals, no large fire, no text, no logo, no watermark, no modern objects
